title: Decision: Standardize on MBT-XX Jira Project Key Convention
description:
Repository documentation and templates were inconsistently using both DTP-XX and MBT-XX as Jira project key prefixes. The active Jira board uses the MBT project at goodmangroup.atlassian.net.

## Decision
Standardize on **MBT-XX** as the official Jira project key convention across all repository files, documentation, and templates.

## Actions
- Update all repo files referencing DTP-XX to use MBT-XX
- Document the decision in docs/WORKFLOW.md
- Align the team on the convention before creating additional tickets
acceptance_criteria: All repository files updated to use MBT-XX convention
Team is aligned on using MBT-XX for all future tickets
implementation_notes: Part of V3 Architecture Planning Phase 1. Resolves ambiguity between DTP and MBT project key prefixes.
